title: automatic per-session capture + HTML refresh at session close (hook)
action: Make the performance matrix update AUTOMATICALLY at session close, fail-open. In hooks/bee-session-close.mjs main() (after ctx/root/session id resolve), add a best-effort perf step wrapped in its OWN try/catch that NEVER changes the exit code: import the vendored perf.mjs via libModuleUrl(root,'perf.mjs'); resolve the just-ended session transcript (resolveTranscript(claudeProjectsRoot(), root, {sessionId})); compute its rollup and upsert it into a per-session store under the global perf dir keyed by sessionId (so Stop+PreCompact double-fire does not double count — overwrite the same session file, e.g. <globalPerfDir>/sessions/<sessionId>.json); then regenerate the HTML report FROM THE CACHE (scanProjects with the mtime/size cache -> writeReport) which is cheap because only the current session's transcript changed. If perf.mjs import or any step fails, swallow it (logCrash-style) and continue — the hook still exits 0. Do the heavy nothing: never full-parse all 347MB inline beyond the cache miss for the one changed file. Add contract test rows in hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs (eventRows / the session-close fixture): a Stop event with a session id and a fake CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR/BEEHIVE_PERF_DIR temp still exits 0, and a perf failure (missing transcript) does not flip the exit code. Vendored .bee/bin/hooks copy is synced in perf-report-4.

truths: Session close (Stop/PreCompact) triggers a best-effort perf update that regenerates the HTML from the cache.
The perf step is wrapped so ANY failure (missing transcript, import error) leaves the hook exit code unchanged (fail-open, exit 0).
Per-session upsert keyed by sessionId prevents Stop+PreCompact double counting.
No inline full 347MB scan — only the changed session's transcript is parsed (cache handles the rest).
prohibitions: The hook MUST NOT throw or emit decision:block on any perf failure (critical-patterns 20260714 fail-open).
Do NOT run a full cross-project reparse inline; rely on the mtime/size cache.
Do NOT edit the vendored .bee/bin/hooks copy here (perf-report-4 mirrors it).

trace.outcome: Automatic matrix refresh at session close (bee-session-close.mjs maybePerfRefresh): scan+writeReport, fail-open, cache-only (no cold scan inline). Idempotent via transcript-derived scan — no per-session store needed (deviation, decision be46bff7). test_hook_contracts 148/0
trace.verification_evidence: { "deliberate_exceptions": ["New best-effort perf refresh in the session-close hook; no prior behavior. Proof = test_hook_contracts 148/0 with fail-open exit 0 preserved. Deviation from the cell's per-session-store approach (decision be46bff7): the scan-derived matrix is naturally idempotent, so no keyed store is needed; the hook only refreshes when a cache exists to avoid a cold scan inline. Full cross-project e2e runs after perf-report-4 mirrors the updated perf.mjs into .bee/bin/lib."] }
trace.verify_output: test_hook_contracts: 148 rows across 18 check groups (0 skipped), 0 failing; ALL PASS — session-close perf refresh is fail-open, exit 0 preserved
